scripts.dev: npm run build:contracts && concurrently "npm run dev:contracts" "npm run dev -w @bac-bank/api"
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:contracts && concurrently "npm run dev:contracts" "npm run dev -w @bac-bank/api" "npm run dev:worker -w @bac-bank/api" "npm run dev -w @bac-bank/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:contracts && concurrently "npm run dev:contracts" "npm run dev -w @bac-bank/api"
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:contracts && concurrently "npm run dev:contracts" "npm run dev:worker -w @bac-bank/api"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:contracts && concurrently "npm run dev:contracts" "npm run dev -w @bac-bank/web"
scripts.release:check: npm run prisma:generate -w @bac-bank/api && npm run prisma:validate -w @bac-bank/api && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis adminer
